task: coral reef conservation (species identification, growth monitoring, task prioritization, resource allocation, real-time recommendations)
input: coral reef images, environmental data, conservation task data
output: species identification, growth metrics, prioritized tasks, resource allocation plans, real-time recommendations
backbone: CNN (transfer learning), hybrid scheduling (AHP+TOPSIS+RL), XAI, KGCN
key_idea: integrates CNNs, hybrid scheduling, XAI, and KGCN for automated coral reef conservation
